final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night 杭州 self-guided itinerary, with a real 杭州 map as the central visual spine, landmark illustrations floating on cardstock.

Style/medium: needs a travel-attack-card / illustrated-brochure aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be tri-fold layout with real 杭州 map as central spine, 4 day-panels divided clearly, landmark cutouts with floating shadow effect on cardstock
Subject: must include all scenic spots, dining, and tips across 4 day-panels:
  Day 1 (西湖经典游): 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺
  Day 2 (禅意杭州): 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰 / 法喜寺 / 宋城
  Day 3 (九溪烟树): 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径
  Day 4A (运河文艺线): 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺
  Day 4B (西溪湿地): 周家村 / 深潭口 / 西溪湿地氦气球
Scene/backdrop: must be a real 杭州 map base with all day-routes visually connected across panels
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, inviting travel-guide atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking 江南 ink-wash and fresh greenery — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include paper cardstock cutout aesthetic with floating drop-shadows under each landmark illustration
Text (verbatim): must include the following itinerary copy distributed across day-panels (verbatim placement):
  Day 1: 「断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺」⏰ 7:30出发 | 午餐：楼外楼（东坡肉+龙井虾仁）人均150元 | 租共享单车5元/小时
  Day 2: 「灵隐寺→飞来峰→法喜寺→宋城」| 十八籽手串46元 | 《宋城千古情》贵宾席320元 | 晚餐：素描餐厅人均90元
  Day 3: 「九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径」| 龙井问茶50元/杯 | 摆渡车8元 | 晚餐：茶人村人均120元
  Day 4A: 「拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺」| 博物馆免费 | 水上巴士1号线3元
  Day 4B: 「周家村→深潭口→氦气球俯瞰湿地180元」
  伴手礼: 南宋胡记荷花酥38元/盒 | 万事利丝绸方巾150-300元
  住宿: ✅ 杭州君悦酒店 / 青芝坞民宿200元 ❌ 避开火车站周边
  交通: 萧山机场→西湖 地铁1号线7元/50分钟 | 灵隐寺专线 龙翔桥乘7W路5元
Constraints: must preserve real geographic accuracy of 杭州 map; all 4 day-panels must be visible in tri-fold layout; all 景点 and dining entries must be preserved; Day 4 dual-option (A/B) must both appear
Avoid: generic tourist-map clipart; illegible small text; distorted landmark proportions
